title: Paper Tiger
relevance_summary: Secretive minting and manipulation of collateral ratios on a DeFi protocol

prevention.rule: Block any tx that mints tokens in secret or manipulates collateral ratios without user consent.

monitoring_rules: Block any tx that mints tokens in secret or manipulates collateral ratios without user consent.
summary: Parallel Finance secretly minted tokens and manipulated collateral ratios, leading to significant losses. A guard could have detected and blocked these actions by monitoring for secret minting and unauthorized collateral ratio changes.
